SEC_CONTACT_EMAIL.description: Real email for the User-Agent header. SEC mandates a contact in the User-Agent on every request to *.sec.gov; missing or invalid → 403. Use a monitored mailbox.

CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN.description: Optional. Long-lived OAuth credential issued by `claude /login`. Sent as the x-api-key header (the public Messages API rejects OAuth tokens via Bearer auth). Set this OR ANTHROPIC_API_KEY to enable the LLM fallbacks.

ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.description: Optional alternative to CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN. Enables two LLM-backed fallbacks: (1) status resolver — fires when validator emits title_mismatch on extracted items, asks Claude Haiku 4.5 to confirm/correct status (catches era-renames like pre-2003 Item 14, unusual IBR phrasings); (2) locator fallback — fires when required items are missing, asks the LLM to find them in the first 50KB of the doc. Capped at MAX_LLM_CALLS_PER_REQUEST = 3 (shared budget across both layers; today each makes ≤ 1 call), ≤50KB input. Without either credential the pipeline runs rules-only and leaves the warnings unresolved.

DAILY_LLM_BUDGET_USD.description: Optional. Process-wide daily ceiling for total LLM spend, in USD. Default $5. Resets on UTC date rollover. When exhausted, the LLM gates skip with a `llm_skipped_daily_budget_exhausted` warning and the request still returns 200 with rules-only coverage. Cost shield, not auth — counter lives in process memory and resets on container restart.

RATE_LIMIT_PER_MIN.description: Optional. Per-IP request rate limit in requests-per-minute. Default 10. Identity is read from X-Forwarded-For (Zeabur is behind a reverse proxy). /healthz, /, /docs, /redoc, /openapi.json are exempt. In-process bucket — resets on container restart, doesn't span workers.

RATE_LIMIT_BURST.description: Optional. Per-IP rate-limit burst capacity. Default 10. Should typically equal RATE_LIMIT_PER_MIN unless you want to allow short spikes.
